privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for vtiger_crm_env create_sales_order task by confirming that the Organization (Greenfield Properties LLC), Contact (Diana Greenfield), and 3 products are synthetically generated and dynamically injected via a PHP script in setup_task.sh. Verified that the expected total of 2470.00 matches both the task instructions and the mathematical sum of the 3 requested line items.
